titleStmt.title: SII 10.510: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 510. (A.R. No. 753 of 1920.) ON A PILLAR IN THE TEMPLE OF BHĪMĒŚVARA, MŌGALLU, BHIMAVARAM TALUK, WEST GODAVARI DISTRICT. Ś. 1237. (Rākshasa)

summary.p: Incomplete. States that Attili Peda-Pōti-Raḍḍi put up a stone pillar in the nandi-maṇḍapa of the temple of Bhīmēśvara of Mōṅgolanu and also gave 5 puṭṭis of land to Pramathakavi Sirigiri-Ayyaṅgāru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīśubhaśakavarṣaṁbulu 1237 gu nēṁ
ṭi rākṣasasaṁvatsara Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtti yaṁ
du śrīmōṁgolani śrīmūlastāna śrībhīmēsva
raśrīmanmahādēvara muṁdaṭi naṁdimaṁḍa
pamunaṁdu Attili pedapōtiraḍi tamataṁḍri
māṟeḍikini tamatali sūramaraḍisāniki dha
rmugāṁ beṭini śilākaṁbamu Ācaṁdrārkkastā
higānu śrī
pramathakavi sirigiriAyyaṁ
gārikini laṁjepāṭipolāna
vritti AIduvuṭlu lekā kha 5
naṁddikaṁbālu veṭṭina cēlu ceṟupiḷavā
riceṁta saitamu

stānanirdēśālu pallākōvi dami
pūṁḍivāriceṁta kha 1 kasaniṭṭice
ṁta tāḍladoḍḍi puṭeṁḍu dōsalāva
Aniseṭipōḍuceṁta kha 1 vaṭūri
Aniseṭiceṁta kha 1 dakṣaṇāna muppi
reḍḍivāriceṁta kha 1 na 10 mālalace
ṁta kha 1 nūṁpaIṁḍāvalōnu
ceṟupiḷavāriceṁta kha 1 kolise
ṭṭi ceṁta na 10 Aniseṭṭi pōtanace
ṁta kha 1 pinasūru ḍitta ṁgukēsu
ceṁta na 10 tulavolamulōnu Ōḍa
lavāriceṁta kha 3 kāminēnivāri

siriseṭṭivāriceṁta kha 2
buḍumacēnu ceṁgamanēni
nāniseṭṭiceṁta kha 1 ceṟuvu vena
ka Ōḍalavāriceṁta na 10 peṁneru
Aṁmaguḍikaḍa Aḍukulavāriceṁ
tana 10 . mōṭupallivāriceṁta na 10
verasi kēsaripadunenimidivuṭlu
rācadoḍḍi mānipipeṭina nivēśa
namu ŪriUttarabhāgāna ni
ddumu Iṁdlugaṭṭina stalamu
sarvamānyamu mahāśrī
Digital edition of SII 10.510 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
